height_to_width.desc: 主体高度/面宽（大殿面阔七间、平坐较低）

depth_to_width.desc: 进深/面宽（四间深 / 七间阔 ≈ 0.57）

window_wall_ratio.desc: 窗洞占比（实墙+柱网为主）

aiInstruction: Tailiang timber hall (structural_typology=tailiang_timber_hall). PREFERRED: STRUCTURE + typology:tailiang_timber_hall; reference_landmark=foguang_temple_hall for 7-bay proportions. Params: baysX=7, baysZ=4, width≈21, depth≈15, hallHeight≈7, includeSubEaves=true. layout.skeleton_type=GRID_BAY.
